name: Generic B2B SaaS fit
description: Lightweight second rubric proving multi-ICP support — B2B SaaS with real product surface.

criteria.label: Meaningful product workflows
criteria.pass_hint: Billing, roles, integrations, or multi-step product

criteria.label: Growth / funding / launch signal
criteria.pass_hint: Recent funding, launch, or ship activity

criteria.label: Too simple / not a real product company
criteria.pass_hint: ANTI: no real SaaS product surface
